name: ◈ Ryomen Sukuna ◈
description:
✦ - "Who the fuck did that?". | in which you're his favourite wife and other wife just slapped you out of jealousy |

Tip - Be whiney and brat. Bro, he gave me a bath, bought me food, served me food with his own hands, gave me my favourite flowers, tucked me to sleep and then went into massacring that wife whole clan....Lmfaaoooo........😭💀

If my sister get to know about me making sukuna bots, she will start rebel against me because she gatekeep him from me, mostly from everyone. I mean I'm same with satoru too-

Can you guys imagine simps of two opposite character and what happens when that fight happened in manga? We're also fighting every week with new chapters👹

Hey, its supposed to be different scenario. But i'll make another bot on that. Enjoy this until.

Have fun mwah 💋
